turns.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="bg" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1b2a6b"/>
      <stop offset="55%" stop-color="#0b5ea8"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#081a3a"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="r1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff2a6d"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffcc00"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="r2" x1="1" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00e5ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7c4dff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="glow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" result="b"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="b"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bg)"/>

  <!-- Color rays -->
  <g opacity="0.95" filter="url(#glow)">
    <path d="M256 120 L270 55 L290 120" fill="none" stroke="#ffcc00" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M230 130 L205 70 L200 140" fill="none" stroke="#00e5ff" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M282 140 L310 90 L300 160" fill="none" stroke="#7c4dff" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M190 170 L130 150 L200 200" fill="none" stroke="#ff2a6d" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M320 170 L380 150 L310 205" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Central vivid burst -->
  <g filter="url(#glow)" transform="translate(0,6)">
    <circle cx="256" cy="240" r="92" fill="url(#r1)" opacity="0.95"/>
    <circle cx="250" cy="228" r="70" fill="url(#r2)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <circle cx="265" cy="255" r="48" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.18"/>

    <!-- Splashes / droplets -->
    <path d="M180 245 C155 210, 195 165, 225 205 C250 240, 200 275, 180 245Z" fill="#ff2a6d" opacity="0.95"/>
    <path d="M330 230 C365 205, 410 245, 370 275 C340 300, 305 260, 330 230Z" fill="#00e5ff" opacity="0.9"/>
    <path d="M220 320 C195 340, 190 385, 230 390 C275 395, 265 350, 220 320Z" fill="#7c4dff" opacity="0.9"/>
    <path d="M292 315 C315 300, 355 305, 360 340 C365 380, 325 390, 292 360 C275 345, 275 325, 292 315Z" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.9"/>

    <!-- Sparkle dots -->
    <g>
      <circle cx="206" cy="250" r="7" fill="#ffe66d"/>
      <circle cx="312" cy="250" r="6" fill="#9effff"/>
      <circle cx="252" cy="185" r="6" fill="#ff9ad1"/>
      <circle cx="278" cy="320" r="6" fill="#b9a7ff"/>
      <circle cx="230" cy="300" r="5" fill="#b6ff7a"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Foreground color blobs -->
  <g opacity="0.95" filter="url(#glow)">
    <path d="M120 360 C110 320, 145 285, 185 305 C220 323, 220 375, 180 390 C155 400, 128 395, 120 360Z" fill="#ffcc00"/>
    <path d="M390 360 C402 320, 370 282, 330 300 C295 316, 292 372, 332 392 C355 404, 382 395, 390 360Z" fill="#ff2a6d"/>
    <path d="M150 165 C165 135, 210 125, 230 155 C250 185, 225 215, 185 210 C155 205, 138 195, 150 165Z" fill="#00e5ff"/>
    <path d="M360 160 C345 132, 300 120, 282 148 C265 176, 288 214, 332 205 C360 200, 375 190, 360 160Z" fill="#7c4dff"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Subtle frame -->
  <rect x="20" y="20" width="472" height="472" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" stroke-width="2"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

{ "svg": "<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="gSun" cx="50%" cy="45%" r="60%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#fff7b0"/>

      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00c2ff"/>
      <stop offset="35%" stop-color="#2dff7a"/>
      <stop offset="70%" stop-color="#ff3dbb"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffd100"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- Background -->
  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="#070A12"/>
  <circle cx="380" cy="140" r="120" fill="#0d1635" opacity="0.85"/>
  <circle cx="130" cy="380" r="160" fill="#0b2440" opacity="0.55"/>

  <!-- Colorful sunburst to suggest "vivid" -->
  <g transform="translate(256,250)">
    <!-- Rays -->
    <g>
      <path d="M0 -190 L22 -110 L-22 -110 Z" fill="url(#gRays)" opacity="0.95"/>
      <path d="M135 -135 L110 -22 L110 -0 Z" fill="#00c2ff" opacity="0.95"/>
      <path d="M190 0 L110 22 L110 -22 Z" fill="#2dff7a" opacity="0.95"/>
      <path d="M135 135 L110 22 L110 0 Z" fill="#ff3dbb" opacity="0.95"/>
      <path d="M0 190 L22 110 L-22 110 Z" fill="#ffd100" opacity="0.95"/>
      <path d="M-135 135 L-110 22 L-110 0 Z" fill="#2dff7a" opacity="0.95"/>
      <path d="M-190 0 L-110 -22 L-110 22 Z" fill="#00c2ff" opacity="0.95"/>
      <path d="M-135 -135 L-110 -22 L-110 0 Z" fill="#ff3dbb" opacity="0.95"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Extra curved glow arcs -->
    <g fill="none" stroke="url(#gRays)" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.85">
      <path d="M-165 -55 C -90 -160, 90 -160, 165 -55"/>
      <path d="M-170 10 C -90 -80, 90 -80, 170 10" opacity="0.6"/>
      <path d="M-165 75 C -90 -20, 90 -20, 165 75" opacity="0.75"/>
    </g>

    <!-- Central bright core -->
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="105" fill="url(#gSun)"/>
    <circle cx="-10" cy="-15" r="55" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.35"/>

    <!-- Sparkles -->
    <g opacity="0.95" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M-160 -20 L-190 -35" stroke="#00c2ff" stroke-width="6"/>
      <path d="M-160 -20 L-188 -5" stroke="#00c2ff" stroke-width="6"/>

      <path d="M160 -35 L185 -55" stroke="#ff3dbb" stroke-width="6"/>
      <path d="M160 -35 L185 -15" stroke="#ff3dbb" stroke-width="6"/>

      <path d="M70 150 L55 185" stroke="#2dff7a" stroke-width="6"/>
      <path d="M70 150 L95 182" stroke="#ffd100" stroke-width="6"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Foreground halo -->
  <circle cx="256" cy="260" r="160" fill="none" stroke="#ffffff" stroke-opacity="0.08" stroke-width="12"/>
  <circle cx="256" cy="260" r="195" fill="none" stroke="url(#gRays)" stroke-opacity="0.18" stroke-width="8"/>
</svg>" }
message.reasoning:
**Creating vivid abstract art**

I’m thinking about how to depict the word "vivid" through abstract drawing. I want to use bright colors and create vivid gradient rays, maybe even an eye. I can’t include any text. Colorful shapes like sunbursts and rainbows come to mind! I’ll make sure to keep it simple, using SVG format with shapes, ensuring a 512 size and a dark background with a central sun and gradients. I’ll also add a few circles and return it in JSON format!

I’ll also add a few circles and return it in JSON format!

{
  "svg": "<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="bg" cx="50%" cy="35%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1b2a6b"/>
      <stop offset="55%" stop-color="#0b5ea8"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#081a3a"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <linearGradient id="r1" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ff2a6d"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#ffcc00"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="r2" x1="1" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00e5ff"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#7c4dff"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="glow" x="-50%" y="-50%" width="200%" height="200%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="6" result="b"/>
      <feMerge>
        <feMergeNode in="b"/>
        <feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/>
      </feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>

  <rect width="512" height="512" fill="url(#bg)"/>

  <!-- Color rays -->
  <g opacity="0.95" filter="url(#glow)">
    <path d="M256 120 L270 55 L290 120" fill="none" stroke="#ffcc00" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M230 130 L205 70 L200 140" fill="none" stroke="#00e5ff" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M282 140 L310 90 L300 160" fill="none" stroke="#7c4dff" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M190 170 L130 150 L200 200" fill="none" stroke="#ff2a6d" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M320 170 L380 150 L310 205" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="10" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Central vivid burst -->
  <g filter="url(#glow)" transform="translate(0,6)">
    <circle cx="256" cy="240" r="92" fill="url(#r1)" opacity="0.95"/>
    <circle cx="250" cy="228" r="70" fill="url(#r2)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <circle cx="265" cy="255" r="48" fill="#ffffff" opacity="0.18"/>

    <!-- Splashes / droplets -->
    <path d="M180 245 C155 210, 195 165, 225 205 C250 240, 200 275, 180 245Z" fill="#ff2a6d" opacity="0.95"/>
    <path d="M330 230 C365 205, 410 245, 370 275 C340 300, 305 260, 330 230Z" fill="#00e5ff" opacity="0.9"/>
    <path d="M220 320 C195 340, 190 385, 230 390 C275 395, 265 350, 220 320Z" fill="#7c4dff" opacity="0.9"/>
    <path d="M292 315 C315 300, 355 305, 360 340 C365 380, 325 390, 292 360 C275 345, 275 325, 292 315Z" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.9"/>

    <!-- Sparkle dots -->
    <g>
      <circle cx="206" cy="250" r="7" fill="#ffe66d"/>
      <circle cx="312" cy="250" r="6" fill="#9effff"/>
      <circle cx="252" cy="185" r="6" fill="#ff9ad1"/>
      <circle cx="278" cy="320" r="6" fill="#b9a7ff"/>
      <circle cx="230" cy="300" r="5" fill="#b6ff7a"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Foreground color blobs -->
  <g opacity="0.95" filter="url(#glow)">
    <path d="M120 360 C110 320, 145 285, 185 305 C220 323, 220 375, 180 390 C155 400, 128 395, 120 360Z" fill="#ffcc00"/>
    <path d="M390 360 C402 320, 370 282, 330 300 C295 316, 292 372, 332 392 C355 404, 382 395, 390 360Z" fill="#ff2a6d"/>
    <path d="M150 165 C165 135, 210 125, 230 155 C250 185, 225 215, 185 210 C155 205, 138 195, 150 165Z" fill="#00e5ff"/>
    <path d="M360 160 C345 132, 300 120, 282 148 C265 176, 288 214, 332 205 C360 200, 375 190, 360 160Z" fill="#7c4dff"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Subtle frame -->
  <rect x="20" y="20" width="472" height="472" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" stroke-width="2"/>
</svg>"
}
message.reasoning:
**Creating a vivid drawing**

I need to create a drawing that embodies "vivid" without using any text. It should feature bright, colorful splashes—lots of overlapping blobs and rays in vivid colors. I'm planning to work with a 512 canvas and produce an SVG format in JSON. The design will include a gradient background and colorful droplets, focusing on simple shapes like circles, paths, and rays. It's crucial to keep it text-free throughout this process.

It's crucial to keep it text-free throughout this process.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

message.reasoning:
**Identifying a character**

I'm trying to figure out an abstract character that has a crown and balloons. I see a central circle with a face, surrounded by colorful circles that look like planets or bubbles. It could be something like a “clown,” but the crown suggests it might be a “king” or “prince.” I think there are elements of a birthday theme here, so I should consider words like “king,” “queen,” “party,” or “mascot.” It feels like a festive character.**Analyzing a birthday theme**

I'm examining yellow shapes that look like candles, which gives me a "birthday" vibe. The central face has colorful dots around it, representing balloons, suggesting a “birthday party.” I think my first guess could be "birthday," especially since the top shapes resemble candles or possibly fireworks. I'm leaning towards calling it a "balloon creature" with a party hat or crown. I really want to gather terms like "birthday," "celebration," and "party," aiming for 20 unique words.**Creating a word list**

I’m putting together a list of words related to birthdays and celebrations. I’ve got “birthday,” “party,” “celebration,” and “cake” on there, along with “candles” and “crown.” Then I thought about royal characters like “king,” “queen,” and “prince,” plus fun figures like “jester” and “clown.” I’ll include “balloons” as plural and also add “bubble,” “planet,” “star,” “unicorn,” “wizard,” and “jolly.” I need to make sure each word is unique and without punctuation.
